content.text:
Fixed it.

What I found:
- A stray literal `<\/script>` was sitting inside the main `<script>` block. That breaks JavaScript execution, which explains why only the header showed.
- There was also a broken string inside the `+ Add Emojis` button `onclick`, which caused a JS syntax error in `render()`.

What I changed:
- Removed the stray `<\/script>` line from `~/agent-mission-control/recipe-rip/index.html`
- Fixed the broken quoting in the inline `onclick` handler
- Copied the fixed file to:
  - `~/agent-mission-control/dist-recipe/index.html`

Verification:
- `node --check` on the extracted script now passes
- Took a fresh browser screenshot of `http://localhost:8789`
- Confirmed the page now renders beyond the header, including:
  - “🍴 Recipe Rip”
  - Rip / Saved tabs
  - bottom URL input + “Rip It” button

Commit:
- `925bfb4` — `Fix Recipe Rip client-side render`

One note:
- The git repo only tracked `dist-recipe/index.html`, so that is what got committed. The source file in `recipe-rip/index.html` was also updated locally and copied over as requested.
